title: oenothera biennis var. strigosa
intro: Oenothera biennis var. strigosa, also known as the hairy evening primrose, is a variety of the evening primrose plant that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Oenothera biennis var. strigosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including cold sores, eczema, and sore throats.
